name: Yarlagadda, Roopa
evidence: Roopa Yarlagadda is an Accountant / CPA at TxDOT in Austin (salary ~$86,310 as of 2024); appears in TxDOT accounting records. Matches donor occupation (Accountant), employer (TxDOT) and Austin 78736. Gave to challenger Neha Shah.

name: Cobb, Amy
resolved_employer: Amy Cobb Consulting (self-employed); We Are Blood
evidence: Amy Cobb is a Pflugerville-based nonprofit accountant / QuickBooks ProAdvisor and owner of Amy Cobb Consulting, specializing in nonprofit accounting; consistent with donor occupation (Accountant) and employer strings 'We Are Blood, Self' at Pflugerville 78660. No ideological PAC or lobbyist record found.

name: Harding, Vincent
evidence: Vincent Alexander Harding is a Texas-licensed attorney and former Chair of the Travis County Democratic Party; ran for Austin City Council District 1 in 2018; later moved to Houston and serves as school-district counsel at Aldine ISD, with prior University of Texas at Austin affiliation. Matches Houston 77044, Attorney, University of Texas, Aldine ISD associate counsel.

affiliations.snippet: Vincent Harding served as Chair of the Travis County Democratic Party (announced Oct. 2017 he would not seek another term) and ran for Austin City Council District 1 in 2018.

name: Hallmark, Chad
evidence: Chad Hallmark is a Principal (formerly VP/Development Associate) at OHT Partners, an Austin luxury multifamily real-estate developer; Austin native, UT-Austin McCombs MBA. Matches donor occupation (Residential Developer/Real Estate), employer (OHT Partners) and Austin 78703.

name: Carr, Stuart
evidence: Carr Residential LLC is a family-owned Austin residential real-estate development/construction company; consistent with donor occupation (Residential Development), employer (Carr Residential LLC) and Austin 78746. Company 'About' page does not name Stuart Carr individually, so identity is inferred from the company. The registered TX lobbyist 'Snapper L. Carr' (Focused Advocacy) is a different person and is NOT this donor.

name: Maedius, Andrew
evidence: Donor name 'Maedius' is a misspelling of Andrew Kingsland Maebius. Texas Bar and Justia list him as a Business/Real Estate attorney whose firm is Riverside Resources (an Austin commercial real estate investment firm), where he serves as in-house/corporate counsel; licensed in TX since 2001. Zip 78703 (Tarrytown/Tarry Hill) matches; listed as president of the Tarry Hill Homeowner's Association. Donor's 'Investor' occupation + 'Riverside Resource' employer align. No FEC ideological-PAC contributions and no state lobbyist registration found.

affiliations.role: In-house/corporate counsel; business & real estate attorney
affiliations.snippet: State Bar of Texas / Justia list Andrew Kingsland Maebius, firm 'Riverside Resources,' practice areas Business and Real Estate, Austin TX, licensed 2001.
CorporationWiki lists Andrew Maebius as President for Tarry Hill Homeowner's Association, Inc. (Tarry Hill is in the 78703 zip).

name: Sookiasian, Nanette Y.
evidence: Retired. Identity corroborated via the Austin American-Statesman obituary of Antonio Soza (2018), which names daughter 'Nanette Sookiasian' and husband 'Rick' (Richard). Same 78746 (Westlake) address as Richard F. Sookiasian confirms a spousal pair (née Soza). No career/employer beyond 'retired' documented; no FEC ideological-PAC contributions and no Texas lobbyist registration found under her name.

name: Sookiasian, Richard F.
evidence: Retired; spouse of Nanette Y. Sookiasian (same 78746 address; obituary of Antonio Soza names son-in-law 'Rick'). A 'Richard Sookiasian' (rare surname, Austin) was a registered Texas lobbyist in 2010 for the Texas Association of Manufacturers, consistent with a now-retired government-relations career — plausibly the same person but not fully confirmed to the donor's middle initial. No FEC ideological-PAC contributions found.

affiliations.role: Registered lobbyist (2010) — likely same person, now retired
affiliations.snippet: 2010 TEC lobby list: Richard Sookiasian (ID 00061372) registered for client Texas Association of Manufacturers, prospective compensation $25,000-$49,999.99, 01/08/2010-11/04/2010.

name: Siegel, Michael
evidence: Confirmed public official: Mike (Michael J.W.) Siegel, elected 2024 as Austin City Council Member for District 7. Civil-rights/employment attorney (J.D. Cornell, B.A. Brandeis), former Assistant City Attorney for the City of Austin, and two-time Democratic nominee for U.S. House TX-10 (2018 and 2020). Co-founder of Ground Game Texas, a progressive issue-campaign advocacy organization. Zip 78757 (Crestview) matches his District 7 residence. No pro-Israel/pro-Palestine, oil & gas, or gun PAC affiliations surfaced.

affiliations.role: City Council Member, District 7 (elected 2024); former Assistant City Attorney
affiliations.snippet: Official city bio: Mike Siegel elected 2024 to represent Austin's District 7; civil rights lawyer and former Assistant City Attorney who co-authored/defended city policies including paid sick leave.
Siegel co-founded Ground Game Texas, which pursues democracy and social-justice local issue campaigns across the state.

affiliations.role: Democratic nominee 2018 & 2020 vs. Rep. Michael McCaul
affiliations.snippet: Won the 2020 Democratic runoff for Texas' 10th Congressional District for a rematch with Republican Rep. Michael McCaul; came within ~5 points in 2018.

name: Bordas, Mark

LinkedIn/RocketReach also list him as Senior Vice President for Governmental Affairs (Southwest Region) at Scofes & Associates Consulting, with prior roles at Anheuser-Busch. Zip 78746 (Westlake) matches his TEC registration. Government-relations/lobbying places him in Consulting / PR. No pro-Israel/pro-Palestine, oil & gas, or gun ideological-PAC contributions surfaced.

affiliations.snippet: CorporationWiki lists Mark Bordas as Managing Member for Aegis Advocacy, LLC; TEC lists Mark E. Bordas as a registered lobbyist under Aegis Advocacy LLC (2018-2025).

affiliations.role: Senior Vice President, Governmental Affairs - Southwest Region

name: Wiese, William
evidence: William 'Bill' Wiese is a Partner at DuBois, Bryant & Campbell (Austin) and a Registered Patent Attorney (USPTO). His practice is intellectual-property transactions: software/patent licenses, technology development, trademark and Internet/privacy law. J.D. with Honors from UT Austin. Identity corroborated by Austin location and the exact employer string. No ideological/PAC (AIPAC, J Street, oil & gas, defense, NRA, gun-control) contributions and no TX lobbyist registration found.

affiliations.snippet: Bill Wiese specializes in intellectual-property-based transactions including software licenses, patent licenses and technology development agreements; Registered Patent Attorney with the USPTO.
Serves as a Life Fellow of the Texas Bar Foundation and a member of the Austin Intellectual Property Inn of Court and the American Intellectual Property Law Association.

name: Flint, Cynthia

Her specific name is not listed on the firm's public 'Meet the Team' page, so individual confirmation rests on the self-reported employer only; confidence medium. No ideological/PAC contributions found on any side and no TX lobbyist registration.

affiliations.snippet: Y Strategy is an Austin-based full-service political consulting firm founded in 2013 to focus on progressive down-ballot candidates; services include campaign management, field organizing, and communications.

name: Gins, Jonathon
evidence: Donor (occupation 'Brewer, Texas Beer Company', Taylor TX 76574, 22 FEC donations) resolves to JD Gins, co-founder and original head brewer of Texas Beer Company, a craft brewery/taproom in downtown Taylor, TX. Published reporting documents that Gins and co-founder Ian Davis met as organizers on the Barack Obama presidential campaign — a documented Democratic-campaign background consistent with his high donation count. No ideological single-issue PAC contributions surfaced and no TX lobbyist registration.

affiliations.snippet: JD Gins is co-founder of Texas Beer Company, a locally owned brewery in Taylor, TX.
